news.t: AllianceBernstein Launches AB US Large Cap Strategic Equities ETF (LRGC) on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: LRGC is an equity ETF with a total of 73 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.04%, Alphabet at 6.68%, Apple at 5.31%, Microsoft at 5.25%, and Amazon.com at 4.70%.

overview.description: The AB US Large Cap Strategic Equities ETF (LRGC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in large-cap US companies. Its stock selection process combines fundamental and quantitative research to identify opportunities while managing risk. LRGC was launched on Sep 20, 2023 and is issued by AB Funds.

data.title: AllianceBernstein Launches AB US Large Cap Strategic Equities ETF (LRGC) on NYSE Arca
data.text: NASHVILLE, Tenn., Sept. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. (NYSE: AB) and AllianceBernstein L.P., a leading global investment management and research firm, announced today the lau...
